# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

# Define plugins in global level for CORS, Authentication & rate-limiting plugin configurations 
kong:
  plugins:
    cors: {} # No specific settings provided here as it's a default one. It would work fine without any configuration unless you want to set the exact values like origin/method restrictions etc in your config file or at Kong API Gateway level using annotations if available for such use case. 
    
    authentication_middleware: {} # No specific settings provided here as it's a default one which would work fine without any configuration unless you want to set the exact values like required roles/users in your config file or at Kong API Gateway level using annotations if available for such use case. 
    
    ratelimiter: {} # No specific settings provided here as it's a default one which would work fine without any configuration unless you want to set the exact values like request frequency/capacity in your config file or at Kong API Gateway level using annotations if available for such use case.
